message:
test(proptest): expand scope_tree coverage from 14 to 61 property tests

Adds 47 new property tests covering: ScopeId (from_path, Display, serde),
ScopeTier (priority ordering, can_have_children, Display, serde),
ScopeState (is_terminal, is_shutting_down, accepts_children, serde),
ScopeNode (defaults, canonical_string, serde), tree registration
(is_empty, len, tier restrictions, draining parent rejection),
lifecycle state machine (all valid/invalid transitions, ScopeNotFound),
shutdown ordering (root last, closed excluded), depth/descendants,
counting/querying, ScopeHandle (clone sharing, multi-shutdown),
ScopeTreeSnapshot arbitrary serde, error Display, well_known IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
